  Thanks for contributing to Bulwark!
  Please fill in the sections below.

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (API surface changes; bumps minor or major)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check`, `black --check`, `mypy bulwark` all clean
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) updated
- [ ] Public API changes documented in [docs/API_REFERENCE.md](../docs/API_REFERENCE.md)
- [ ] If this touches a compliance surface, [docs/COMPLIANCE.md](../docs/COMPLIANCE.md) updated

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay attention to: tricky edges, concerns, etc. -->
